description: Revamped checkout form: blur validation, delivery info sheet, trust signals, clearer CTA

asi.hypothesis: Fixing eager validation (onChange→onBlur), adding delivery transparency via sheet, and clarifying the payment next-step will reduce form anxiety and payment abandonment
asi.changes: form-text-field.tsx: show errors only when touched/submitted; form-text-area-field.tsx: same; form-select-field.tsx: same; checkout-form.tsx: onBlur validators, step indicator, delivery info sheet link, trust signal badges, prominent total with CTA 'Төлбөр төлөх рүү үргэлжлүүлэх →', next-step clarity text; delivery-info-sheet.tsx: new reusable bottom sheet with zone map, info cards, notices from shipping.astro

description: Redesigned checkout UI: collapsible summary, sticky header, field boxes, compact trust row, scroll affordance; fixed payment page mobile overflow

asi.hypothesis: Yellow as text-background hurts readability. Better: yellow for small accents/badges/borders, dark text on white/card. Collapsible summary + scroll hint fixes scroll affordance. Product name line-clamp prevents layout shift. Payment grid-cols-3 on mobile + min-w-0 fixes overflow.
asi.changes: checkout-form.tsx: sticky header with progress bars (yellow=active step), collapsible order summary with toggle, each form field in bordered box, trust badges as single flex-wrap row with tiny text, scroll affordance hint with bouncing chevron + text, product names line-clamp-2, no yellow text backgrounds; payment-options.tsx: min-w-0 overflow-ellipsis on all copy rows; qpay-button.tsx: grid-cols-3 on mobile, smaller icons, less padding

description: Fix header text color and redesign trust badges to 2x2 grid with bold colors

asi.hypothesis: Black header text on black bg-secondary was unreadable. Trust row was tiny gray text that didn't pop. Need white text on dark bg, and actual badge-style 2x2 grid with yellow/black backgrounds.
asi.changes: checkout-form.tsx: added text-secondary-foreground to h2/p/icon on dark delivery header; replaced flex-wrap muted trust row with grid-cols-2 badge grid: yellow bg (Аюулгүй төлбөр, Баталгаат бараа) + black bg (Өдөрт нь хүргэнэ, QPay/Данс), all with bold white text, proper borders/shadows
